title: Sing it Loud

sections.label: Intro
lines: (Oh-oh-oh-oh, sing it loud, lift it high)

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Through the heavens, let it rise,
A song of joy, a love that flies.
From sunrise bright to golden dusk,
His mercy holds, in Him we trust.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Every star, every wave,
Moves in rhythm to His name.
Thunder roars, oceans sing,
All creation’s echoing!

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing it loud! Sing it high!
Praise the One who reigns the sky!
Every heart, every soul,
Let the dance of heaven roll!
(Oh-oh-oh-oh, sing it loud, lift it high)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: He lifts the humble, breaks the chains,
Gives the weary strength again.
His breath ignites the fire within,
A light that burns, it never dims.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Every star, every wave,
Moves in rhythm to His name.
Thunder roars, oceans sing,
All creation’s echoing!

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing it loud! Sing it high!
Praise the One who reigns the sky!
Every heart, every soul,
Let the dance of heaven roll!
(Oh-oh-oh-oh, sing it loud, lift it high)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Shout His name across the land!
Raise your hands, take a stand!
Glory rising, never fades,
Sing forever, love remains!

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Sing it loud! Sing it high!
Praise the One who reigns the sky!
Every heart, every soul,
Let the dance of heaven roll!
(Oh-oh-oh-oh, sing it loud, lift it high)

sections.label: Outro
lines: Hallelujah, never dies,
Forever lifted, forever high…

styleNote: Euphoric Synth Arpeggios · Vocal Harmonies Soaring · Powerhouse Vocal Harmonies
